name: portfolio
description: Bleeding-edge, accessibility-first portfolio built with Astro, React Aria, and a Claude Code studio.
_comment: Dependencies are pinned all-exact (no caret ranges) by deliberate decision — edit versions explicitly and treat the pnpm lockfile as authoritative; this project does not use `astro add` / range resolution. The scripts below are the command contract the studio expects — do not remove them; some tools (eslint, vitest, Playwright + axe, lhci) are installed at SETUP.md Stage 6.
